headline: Discovery blocked: GitHub, docs, and block-explorer contract data not accessible this run

findings.text: Block-explorer search: B² Network Blockscout partially accessible but contract name-tag enumeration did not surface specific UniRouter contract addresses in search results.
Official deployments doc: unirouter.io documentation domain returned permission denied during fetch attempt; canonical deployments page not accessible.
Audit PDFs: No audit links recorded in protocol context; none discovered in search results.

GitHub deployment artifacts: UniRouter GitHub organization accessible via search but fetch returned permission denied; unirouter-bridge-contract repository confirmed to exist but contents not retrieved.
Multi-chain enumeration: Single chain (BSquared) pinned; enumeration steps dependent on D1-D4 data sources remaining inaccessible.

rationale.verdict: Grade unknown because primary sources required to discover deployed contract addresses (GitHub repos with deployment scripts/artifacts, official docs deployments page, and block-explorer contract verification pages) were not accessible this run. Without these, contract addresses cannot be reliably enumerated or validated. Discovery of protocol-controlled or fund-holding contract addresses requires access to at least one of: (a) GitHub source with broadcast logs or deployment manifests, (b) official docs listing, or (c) block-explorer contract pages with verified source. All three pathways returned access denied or empty results.

evidence.shows: GitHub organization exists with 3 repositories (unirouter-bridge-contract, unirouter-staking-contract, DefiLlama-Adapters); fetch blocked with permission denied
UniRouter is a platform for Bitcoin liquid staking derivatives and cross-chain bridging on B² Network; operational context confirmed but no contract addresses listed
$248.14m TVL on BSquared; protocol categorized as Bridge; GitHub link present but no on-page contract address enumeration

unknowns: D1: Block-explorer search on Blockscout returned no specific UniRouter contract addresses; full-page fetch of explorer search results not retrieved
D2: unirouter.io/docs fetch returned permission denied; deployed_contracts_doc URL not discovered
D4: GitHub UniRouter org and unirouter-bridge-contract repository fetch blocked; broadcast/<chainId>/run-latest.json and hardhat-deploy artifacts not accessible
D8: No fetched evidence supporting individual contract addresses; address_book discovery deferred to downstream assessments

protocol_metadata.about: UniRouter is a Bitcoin liquid staking derivatives and cross-chain bridge protocol operating on B² Network (Bitcoin Layer 2). It enables Bitcoin inscription assets and ecosystem tokens to be bridged across multiple blockchains with high liquidity, implementing liquid staking mechanisms and cross-chain messaging security via B² Hub's message sharing protocol.
